## COMPREHENSIVE CODEBASE ANALYSIS

Based on my thorough exploration of the codebase, here is what I found:

---

### **1. FRAMEWORK: Next.js 16.0.10**
- **Type**: App Router (modern Next.js)
- **Language**: TypeScript 5.x with strict mode
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS v4
- **Package**: TypeScript React 19.2.1, React DOM 19.2.1
- **Status**: Production-ready framework

---

### **2. ALL PAGES/ROUTES**

**Dashboard Pages (in `(dashboard)` group):**
- `/` - Home page (root)
- `/llm-sources` - Main LLM Sources list page
- `/llm-sources/new` - Create new LLM Source page
- `/llm-sources/[id]/edit` - Edit existing LLM Source page
- `/llm-sources/[id]/generate` - Generate and preview llm.json/llm.txt files

**Public Routes:**
- `/api/analyze` - AEO Analysis API endpoint (POST for analysis, GET for status)
- `/api/llm-sources` - LLM Sources CRUD API (GET/POST)
- `/api/llm-sources/[id]` - Individual source API (GET/PUT/DELETE)
- `/api/llm-sources/[id]/generate` - Generate files API (POST)
- `/directory/[slug]/llm.json` - Public JSON endpoint
- `/directory/[slug]/llm.txt` - Public TXT endpoint

---

### **3. FEATURES IMPLEMENTED**

#### **Core Features:**

✅ **LLM Source of Truth System**
- Create, edit, delete LLM Sources
- Structured company information (name, type, founding year, location, website)
- Services management (with categories)
- Use cases (with industry)
- Factual differentiators (with source tracking)
- FAQ system (with categories)
- Reference pages (official, documentation, support, legal types)
- Official contacts (email, phone, support URL)
- Geographic coverage (operating countries, languages)

✅ **File Generation & Versioning**
- Generate llm.json files (Schema.org Organization format)
- Generate llm.txt files (human-readable text format)
- Version history tracking
- Public JSON and TXT endpoints
- Auto-versioning on updates

✅ **AEO Analysis Engine**
- Complete AEO (Analysis Engine Optimization) scoring:
  - **Structure Score**: Heading hierarchy, paragraph structure, structured data
  - **Citation Triggers Score**: Keywords like "studies show", "research indicates", etc.
  - **Credibility Score**: Author, date, source tracking
  - **Semantic Score**: Questions, internal links, keyword variety
  - **Quality Score**: Content depth, readability, freshness
  - **AOE Specials**:
    - Chunkability: How easily content can be chunked
    - Direct Answer Density: Number of direct answer candidates
    - FAQ Score: FAQ structure quality
- Short Answer Candidates extraction (5-60 word snippets)
- Web scraping with Cheerio and Axios
- Comprehensive recommendations in French

✅ **Tiered Plan System (Free/Pro/Agency)**
- **FREE Plan**: 1 source max, limited services (5), limited use cases (3), limited FAQ (10), no versioning, no API
- **PRO Plan**: 3 sources, 20 services, 10 use cases, 50 FAQ, custom slugs, version history, API access
- **AGENCY Plan**: 50 sources, unlimited everything, white-label support, bulk export, API access

✅ **Database & Storage**
- Supabase PostgreSQL
- Tables: `llm_sources`, `llm_source_versions`, `users`
- RLS (Row Level Security) policies
- Optimized indexes for performance
- JSONB fields for structured data

✅ **UI Components**
- shadcn/ui components (button, card, input, label, textarea, badge, accordion, alert-dialog, tabs)
- Forms with React Hook Form
- Responsive design
- Dark mode support

✅ **Navigation**
- Dashboard layout with header navigation
- Breadcrumbs and back buttons
- Home and LLM Sources nav items
- Footer with credits

---

### **4. FEATURES NOT FOUND (NOT IMPLEMENTED)**

The following features mentioned in your request are **NOT present** in this codebase:

❌ **AEO Monitoring** - No monitoring dashboard or continuous tracking system
❌ **Generative Tools / Outils Génératives** - No content generation tools (beyond llm file generation)
❌ **AI Indexation / Indexation IA** - No AI-powered indexing system
❌ **Score Gratuit** - No free score/audit tool (only free tier limit on sources)
❌ **White-label Agences** - While mentioned in plan limits, not implemented in UI
❌ **EEAT Builder** - No Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness builder
❌ **API Developer Hub** - No dedicated developer documentation site
❌ **GA4 Integration** - No Google Analytics 4 integration
❌ **Search Console Integration** - No Google Search Console integration
❌ **Retargeting** - No retargeting/audience management
❌ **Scheduling/Planning** - No content scheduling or planning features

---
